title: Senior Teacher - AIF - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - AIF - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
AIF invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AIF:
AIF is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF!
